title: Artona-Announcement
description: Announce System created by DuckyRuby55! Join my Discord for more Updates!
body:
# Artona – Simple Admin Announcements

Artona is a lightweight Minecraft Spigot 1.21 - 1.21.10 plugin that allows server admins to send important messages and titles to all players with just one command.
Perfect for announcements, warnings, or event notifications in a clean and visible way.


---

# Features

**Permission system: **Only players with blocksay.admin can use the commands

<details>
<summary>Commands</summary>

/bs chat (Message)

/bs title (Message)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Suggestions/Bugs</summary>

https://discord.gg/3etRRPhcvk

</details>




→ Displays a message as a title on every player’s screen

**Fast, simple, reliable – no dependencies, no setup hassle**


# Platforms: 
Spigot, Bukkit, Paper and Purpur.
